introduction.description: Counselling module serves as a hub for conducting online and offline counselling. Every counselling is routed through the System.

entry_points: Directed to counselling after reading assessment report

steps: User clicks 'Register' button for a particular counselling
System shows registration form with fields: basic information, topic/issue for counselling, terms and conditions (form viewable by counsellor)
User fills registration form and submits
System asks user to choose a counsellor (counsellor details viewable)
User selects a counsellor and clicks 'Take Appointment' button
System shows available timeslots of the counsellor for a week (user can check next weeks too)
If user selects an available slot:
System sends message to respective counsellor and Helpdesk

System displays message: 'Appointment will be confirmed by the counsellor within 6 hours; If counsellor is not available, you can select a fresh timeslot or check with other counsellors. Or if you want to cancel, press Cancel - money will be refunded in 48 hours'
User clicks 'Proceed to Payment' button
System directs user to payment gateway
If payment done: System shows confirmation message with Helpdesk button

cancelling_counselling_session.trigger: User wants to cancel a confirmed counselling session

cancellation_rules.condition: Cancellation less than 4 hours before scheduled time

steps: User clicks 'Cancel Counselling' button
System shows appropriate message based on cancellation timing
User clicks 'Proceed' or 'Cancel' button
If user proceeds to cancel:
System asks user to enter reason for cancellation (optional)
User enters reason and submits
System cancels counselling session and initiates refund process if eligible

counselling_delivery.description: Counselling delivery is via ZOOM or similar video conference platforms, customized to feel integrated in the System.
steps: System displays countdown clock to remind user about upcoming counselling session
User clicks 'Join Session' button when time is up
If time is not up: System shows message 'Your appointment is --- hours away. Please wait until your turn comes.'
System opens the third-party meeting link
User attends the counselling session
When session is over:
System asks user to give feedback and opens feedback form
Form has questions about user experience and effectiveness of counselling and counsellor
User enters feedback and submits
System saves feedback (Rule: User feedbacks are available only to Admin User)

updating_timeslot_availability.description: Counsellor must update timeslots available for counselling at least weekly (maximum 3 weeks ahead).
steps: User clicks 'Update Timeslots' button
System shows calendar with time-setting facility
User updates timeslot availability for at least one week, maximum three weeks
System saves timeslot availability details
System sends reminder notification daily if timeslot calendar falls short of one week minimum
System sends reminder to Helpdesk too so they can directly contact user to update

confirming_cancelling_appointment.description: After counselee takes an appointment, counsellor must confirm or ask counselee to take another timeslot.
steps: System shows appointment notifications when user signs in
User opens notifications and confirms/cancels appointments
System sends confirmation/cancellation notification to counselee and Helpdesk
Helpdesk executive directly contacts counselee about confirmation/cancellation
System keeps track of every cancellation by user
confirming_cancelling_appointment.note: Counsellors are strictly advised against cancelling requests for appointment as it seriously affects end-user motivation. System tracks cancellation frequency per counsellor.

conducting_concluding_counselling_sessio.description: Counselling session delivered by counsellor through third-party video conference (ZOOM). Admin controls meeting settings; counsellor/counselee have guest role only.
steps: User clicks 'Start a Session' button
System redirects user to the third-party platform
User conducts the counselling session
When session is over:
User ends session by clicking 'End Session' button
System ends session and asks user to fill up Session Summary Form
User fills Summary form and submits
System saves summary form (Rule: Session Summary details available only to user and Admin)
System asks whether a followup-counselling session is consented/fixed
If YES:
System asks user to specify date and time
User specifies date and time for proposed followup session
System sends notification to counselee and Helpdesk
When counselee signs in to dashboard:
System shows countdown clock reminding of next proposed session, asking to initiate payment
User initiates payment and confirms appointment
System stores the confirmation details

helpdesk.description: Helpdesk represents a support executive who is the liaison between counsellors, counselees, trainers, and training students.
helpdesk.role: Receives notifications about new events and reminds of upcoming events, cancellations, postponements through messages or direct calls.
helpdesk.note: This is a new user role with minimum user role in the system.
